title: Note on the EIlenberg-Moore Spectral Sequence
journal: Publications of the Research Institute for Mathematical Sciences
publisher: European Mathematical Society - EMS - Publishing House GmbH
abstract: In this paper, we prove two theorems on the Eilenberg-Moore spectral sequence. We give a relation between the Bockstein homomorphism in the _E_2-term and the Bockstein homomorphism of the space to which the spectral sequence converges and also relate the homology suspension to the Eilenberg-Moore spectral sequence.
